_comment: Omphalos reel spec template — new_reel.py scaffold generates this with absolute paths filled. Kept here as the reference shape. clock block is consumed by clock_overlay.py, ignored by reel_build.py.
name: <slug>
score: <assets/music/<mood>/<track>.mp3 — note CC-BY attribution in captions pack>
title: <_pipeline>/title-futura-v2.png
i2v_prompts: subtle motion only, no zoom, locked-off

frames_gen.negative: numbers, digits, text, letters, words, signage lettering, writing, fantasy, painting, illustration, concept art, gold filigree, medieval, cartoon, anime, deformed hands, low detail

shots.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic film still, <dense scene — props, depth, foreground elements, tonal dial per location>, anamorphic, ARRI Alexa, 35mm film grain, teal-amber grade, grounded science fiction
